docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY WILSON, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT ISTORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, GEORGE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50.(WAIVED) SERVED JAN-24-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ISTORAGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF GEORGE WILSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ISTORAGE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) EDDIE PASTOR, AREA MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT ISTORAGE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILSON, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ISTORAGE $137.24 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $137.24, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $137.24 AT OR BEFORE THE TIME THAT MR. WILSON PICKS UP HIS PROPERTY FROM ISTORAGE. MR. WILSON SHALL MAKE ARRANGEMENTS WITH MR. PASTOR TO PICKUP HIS PROPERTRY ANYTIME AFTER 4/1/25. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
